blended.narrative: Schweitzer is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,300 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 5" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tomorrow: 2.0" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: 17.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 6" over the past week. Current depth: 61".
